equipment.description: Standard API 610 overhung pump for process fluids.
Reciprocating or rotary pump for high viscosity fluids.
API 617 multi-stage compressor for gas processing.
API 618 compressor for high-pressure applications.
API 619 oil-injected or oil-free screw compressor.
Driver for large compressors or power generation.
Driver using process steam for pumps and compressors.
Standard TEMA heat exchanger for liquid/liquid or gas/liquid duty.
API 661 air cooler for condensing or cooling process streams.
High-efficiency heat exchanger for clean services.
Direct fired heater for heating process fluids (e.g., crude heater).
Distillation column for separating hydrocarbon mixtures.
Column for removing specific components from a gas stream.
Column for removing dissolved gases from liquids.
Vessel containing catalyst beds for chemical reactions (e.g., hydrotreater).
Vessel for thermal cracking or other non-catalytic reactions.
On/off isolation valve with low pressure drop.
Valve designed for flow regulation and throttling.
Quarter-turn valve for quick shutoff.
Quarter-turn valve used for large diameter lines.
Prevents reverse flow in pipelines.
Pneumatic or electric valve regulating flow, pressure, or temperature.
Protects equipment from overpressure scenarios.
Rapidly depressurizes a system to the flare.
API 650 tank for low-volatility liquids.
API 650 tank for high-volatility liquids to reduce emissions.
Horizontal pressurized storage for LPG or NGL.
Spherical pressurized storage for large volumes of gas.
Vessel for separating liquids from gas streams (e.g., compressor suction KO).
Horizontal vessel separating gas, oil, and water.
Removes solid particles and liquid droplets from gas.
Separates immiscible liquids (e.g., water from hydrocarbons).
Removes large debris from liquid pipelines.
Safely burns off excess hydrocarbon gases.
Removes liquid droplets before gas enters the flare stack.
Measures mass flow and density directly.
Measures volumetric flow using differential pressure.
Non-intrusive flow measurement using sound waves.
Measures level in vessels, suitable for varying densities.
Measures level based on hydrostatic pressure.
Measures static pressure in pipes or vessels.
Robust sensor for high-temperature measurement.
Highly accurate sensor for moderate temperatures.
Analyzes the chemical composition of gas streams.
Detects hydrogen sulfide for safety and process control.
Standard driver for pumps and small compressors.
Driver for very large compressors.
Controls motor speed for process optimization.
Distributes power to large motors (e.g., 4.16kV or 13.8kV).
Groups motor starters and drives (e.g., 480V).
Steps down grid voltage for plant distribution.
Provides backup AC power for critical instruments.
Provides backup DC power for switchgear and control systems.
